title: Failed Buildah Test - excluded pulled  up parent directories in squashed images
body:
### Issue Description

The vendoring of Buildah v1.41.1 into Podman v5.6 RC2 had a test failure with the "460 bud should include excluded pulled up parent directories in squashed images" test.

```
[+0908s] not ok 460 bud should include excluded pulled up parent directories in squashed images
[+0908s] # (in test file tests/bud.bats, line 8777)
[+0908s] #   `cmp ${squashed} ${squashedlater}' failed
[+0908s] # /var/tmp/go/src/github.com/containers/podman/test-buildah-v1.41.1/tests /var/tmp/go/src/github.com/containers/podman/test-buildah-v1.41.1
[+0908s] # # [checking for: quay.io/libpod/busybox]
[+0908s] # # [restoring from cache: /var/tmp/bats-run-nJDKzh/suite/buildah-image-cache / quay.io/libpod/busybox]
[+0908s] # Getting image source signatures
[+0908s] # Copying blob sha256:9758c28807f21c13d05c704821fdd56c0b9574912f9b916c65e1df3e6b8bc572
[+0908s] # Copying config sha256:f0b02e9d092d905d0d87a8455a1ae3e9bb47b4aa3dc125125ca5cd10d6441c9f
[+0908s] # Writing manifest to image destination
[+0908s] # # podman build --iidfile=/var/tmp/iidfile7eyfhv --force-rm=false --no-cache --squash --source-date-epoch=1754576053 --rewrite-timestamp -t dir:/var/tmp/buildah_tests.v3fljq/squashed-image /var/tmp/buildah_tests.v3fljq/context
[+0908s] # STEP 1/5: FROM scratch
[+0908s] # STEP 2/5: COPY / /
[+0908s] # STEP 3/5: COPY --from=quay.io/libpod/busybox / /
[+0908s] # STEP 4/5: RUN rm -f /Dockerfile
[+0908s] # STEP 5/5: RUN --mount=type=bind,ro,src=/Dockerfile,target=/etc/removed-file --mount=type=bind,ro,src=/Dockerfile,target=/var/spool/mail/tmpfile touch /newfile
[+0908s] # COMMIT dir:/var/tmp/buildah_tests.v3fljq/squashed-image
[+0908s] # -->
[+0908s] # # podman build --iidfile=/var/tmp/iidfiledGsBJW --force-rm=false --no-cache --layers --source-date-epoch=1754576053 --rewrite-timestamp -t not-squashed-image /var/tmp/buildah_tests.v3fljq/context
[+0908s] # STEP 1/5: FROM scratch
[+0908s] # STEP 2/5: COPY / /
[+0908s] # --> b37ed79fcbef
[+0908s] # STEP 3/5: COPY --from=quay.io/libpod/busybox / /
[+0908s] # --> b1dd7d30836a
[+0908s] # STEP 4/5: RUN rm -f /Dockerfile
[+0908s] # --> ed8f8318e412
[+0908s] # STEP 5/5: RUN --mount=type=bind,ro,src=/Dockerfile,target=/etc/removed-file --mount=type=bind,ro,src=/Dockerfile,target=/var/spool/mail/tmpfile touch /newfile
[+0908s] # COMMIT not-squashed-image
[+0908s] # --> d9ef9d448ac3
[+0908s] # Successfully tagged localhost/not-squashed-image:latest
[+0908s] # d9ef9d448ac38c7d053b865637302bbaa55e56dcadcc67582adb25fff8ceccab
[+0908s] # # buildah from --name not-squashed-container not-squashed-image
[+0908s] # not-squashed-container
[+0908s] # # buildah commit --squash not-squashed-container dir:/var/tmp/buildah_tests.v3fljq/squashed-later-image
[+0908s] # Getting image source signatures
[+0908s] # Copying blob sha256:330c8d190323eb91263fddf6de5b306961a6e58699f73a88d9646bb330f88970
[+0908s] # Copying config sha256:e945263e67f6f469aa500ddc8ec6a3e75051b9822b575be87f8fbd15ce69e2f0
[+0908s] # Writing manifest to image destination
[+0908s] # /var/tmp/buildah_tests.v3fljq/squashed-image/2dff89ea6dcf0cbd818308c6c5c26775d6f2ee1d558cdecd81be153eaef3fab7 /var/tmp/buildah_tests.v3fljq/squashed-later-image/330c8d190323eb91263fddf6de5b306961a6e58699f73a88d9646bb330f88970 differ: byte 4, line 1
[+0908s] # /var/tmp/go/src/github.com/containers/podman/test-buildah-v1.41.1
```

comments.body: Fixed with Buildah v1.41.3 and this Podman PR: https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/26828
